name: docker-desktop-cn-patcher

compatibleVersionRules.notes: UI entry found inside app.asar; patch mode: asar.
Some builds do not include desktop UI HTML in app.asar; patcher now falls back to external Resources/app.asar.unpacked style UI entries.
Detect version and UI resource layout before patching. Abort and restore if no known UI entry can be found.

features: Native macOS GUI with progress and logs
Safety hotfix: GUI install is disabled to avoid invalidating Docker Desktop signatures
Restore original Docker from GUI or CLI
Administrator permission prompt with system usage description
Ad-hoc signed app bundle for stable macOS permission identity
Bundled Python ASAR extractor/packer, no Node.js or npx required for users
Safe default install mode that relaunches Docker Desktop and checks for crashes plus Docker Engine availability
Advanced no-restart CLI mode for users who accept delayed launch-risk checks
Automatic rollback on patch or startup failure where startup checks are enabled
Manual restore original Docker from GUI or CLI
